text: Bhuvneshwar Kumar is just 1 wicket away from becoming the second to reach 200
Mumbai Indians hold a narrow 16-14 historical edge over Rajasthan Royals
Rohit Sharma enters tonight's match as Mumbai's top run-scorer this season
Rajasthan Royals can reclaim the top spot in the table with a win over Mumbai
DC's Sameer Rizvi currently leads the Orange Cap race with 160 runs
Jasprit Bumrah needs 1 wicket to tie Ravichandran Ashwin at 187 career wickets
RCB's Jacob Duffy currently leads the 2026 Purple Cap race with 5 wickets
CSK remain the only team without a win after three games in IPL 2026
Sandeep Sharma needs 3 wickets to reach 150 career IPL wickets
Sunil Narine needs 7 wickets to reach 200 career IPL wickets
